## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / restructure
- [ ] Docs / tooling
- [ ] Breaking change

## Environment impact

- [ ] Affects `research` env
- [ ] Affects `staging` env
- [ ] Affects `production` env (⚠ requires promotion review)

## Risk / execution checklist

If this PR touches `risk/`, `execution/`, `live/`, or `strategies/`:

- [ ] All existing risk tests pass
- [ ] New behavior has a corresponding test
- [ ] Backtest re-run and manifest attached (or N/A)
- [ ] No new blocking calls on hot paths

## Testing

- [ ] `make lint` clean
- [ ] `make typecheck` clean (or explained regression)
- [ ] `make test` clean

## Docs

- [ ] `README.md` / `docs/` updated where relevant
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added
